introduction.greeting: We sincerely welcome all of you who have visited the Guri Cult Counseling Center website.

paragraphs.text: The Guri Cult Counseling Center is a counseling center affiliated with Chodae Church of the Presbyterian Church of Korea (Hapdong) denomination and is a member of the Korean Christian Cult Counseling Association. Our center provides counseling and prevention ministry to help individuals, families, and churches who are experiencing difficulties due to Shincheonji.

The most distinctive feature of the Guri Cult Counseling Center is that all of our counseling ministers have personally experienced Shincheonji for more than 10 years. With this unique background, all ministers have gathered with a heart of repentance and a sense of mission, making this a specialized Shincheonji counseling center. Led by Director Pastor Shin Hyun-wook, our full-time counseling ministers strive to provide practical help for recovery and healing based on their real experience with Shincheonji and years of counseling ministry.
highlights: all of our counseling ministers have personally experienced Shincheonji for more than 10 years

paragraphs.text: The Guri Cult Counseling Center has been conducting counseling and prevention activities primarily offline. However, with the hope that more people can access accurate information about Shincheonji and receive the help they need, we have created this website.

While information about Shincheonji has been available through various channels, the sheer volume of information has sometimes made it difficult to find what is actually needed. Therefore, this website focuses on systematically organizing Shincheonji-related materials and counseling information so that anyone can more easily understand and utilize them.

We hope this website will serve as an opportunity for those struggling within Shincheonji to discern the truth and move toward recovery. We hope it will be a channel of comfort and courage for affected families in their overwhelming situations, and practical help for churches and believers in prevention and response.
highlights: an opportunity for those struggling within Shincheonji to discern the truth and move toward recovery
a channel of comfort and courage for affected families in their overwhelming situations
practical help for churches and believers in prevention and response

paragraphs.text: The Guri Cult Counseling Center will continue to do its best to be a counseling center that values each soul and helps with recovery and healing in the truth.

introduction.closing: We bless all who visit this website with the abundant grace and love of the Lord.

shin.name: Pastor Shin Hyun-wook
shin.quote:
20 years of Shincheonji education,
20 years of Shincheonji recovery ministry
shin.description: Based on 20 years of experience as a minister and education director in Shincheonji, he is dedicated to counseling, recovery, and prevention ministry for those affected by Shincheonji.

items: Senior Pastor of Chodae Church (Presbyterian, Hapdong)
Director of the General Assembly Cult Countermeasures Committee Counseling Center
Director of the Korea Christian Cult Counseling Association Guri Counseling Center
Entered Chongshin University Graduate School of Theology
Press conference announcing departure from Shincheonji
7th Education Director of Shincheonji General Assembly
Planted Shincheonji John Tribe Saebit Church
Youth President of Shincheonji Headquarters Church
Evangelist at Shincheonji Branch Church Dongmun Church
Joined a Shincheonji branch church through the deception of the senior pastor
Received baptism at a Presbyterian orthodox church
